insights:
The single best deal among current models is DeepSeek V4 Flash (Max). It delivers the highest composite intelligence score of 47 out of 60 at a blended price of just $0.0600 per million tokens, yielding a value score of 783.3 — far ahead of any competitor. It also offers 135 tokens per second throughput and a massive 1000K context window. For developers who need strong reasoning capability without breaking their inference budget, this model is the clear choice.

Several runners-up offer distinct trade-offs. The MiMo-V2-Flash (Feb 2026) matches DeepSeek’s price of $0.0600 per million tokens but scores lower on intelligence (41/60) and has only a 256K context, making it a weaker alternative for complex tasks. DeepSeek V4 Flash (High) improves intelligence to 46/60 but costs $0.0800 per million, reducing its value score to 575.0. The base DeepSeek V4 Flash, while cheaper at the same $0.0600, drops to 36/60 intelligence. For those who prioritise raw speed, Mercury 2 achieves 917 tokens per second but costs $0.1400 per million and scores only 33/60 on intelligence, making it a poor value. The Hy3-preview model offers a decent 42/60 intelligence at $0.1000 per million, but its value score of 420.0 cannot match the top performers.

For the most common use case — cost-sensitive API calls where moderate to high intelligence is required — the actionable recommendation is to deploy DeepSeek V4 Flash (Max). It provides the best combination of intelligence, price, speed, and context length, with no meaningful downside. If budget constraints are even tighter and lower intelligence is acceptable, the base DeepSeek V4 Flash at the same $0.0600 price
